Records.description: Called T2 in the paper. 2-loop triangle ladder with three off-shell external legs and all massless internal lines. 6 propagators, 5 vertices. Finite in $d=4$, uniform transcendental weight 4. Conformal variables $z \bar{z}=p_2^2/p_1^2$, $(1-z)(1-\bar{z})=p_3^2/p_1^2$. Result involves $\operatorname{Li}_4, \operatorname{Li}_3, \operatorname{Li}_2$ with prefactor $1/((1-z)(1-\bar{z})(z-\bar{z}))$. AMFlow: 1.1 CPU-h/point, 100 points, 20 digits.

Records.authors: Usyukina, Natalia I., Davydychev, Andrei I.
Records.description: Two-loop planar ladder three-point diagram with massless propagators and all off-shell external momenta. Result expressed in terms of $\Phi^{(2)}$ function involving polylogarithms up to $\operatorname{Li}_4$.

Two-loop triangle-box integral used as benchmark for machine-learning optimization of IBP seeding strategies. All external legs are massive with $p_1+p_2+p_3=0$. The paper applies genetic algorithms, FunSearch, and strongly typed genetic programming to discover improved seeding heuristics, reducing the number of IBP seeds from 14588 (rectangular) to 88.

Records.authors: Abreu, Samuel, Britto, Ruth, Duhr, Claude, Gardi, Einan
Records.description: Two-loop three-point ladder with 6 massless propagators and 3 external masses, finite in $D=4$. Weight-4 result in $z,\bar{z}$. Main example: all single/double cuts computed, integral reconstructed from cuts via dispersion and symbol reconstruction.

Triangle ladder family, triangle-ladder_L2_massless-internal-offshell-external. The Usyukina-Davydychev triangle ladder $T^{(L)}$ consists of $(L{-}1)$ box cells capped by a triangle at the apex, with two rails of $L$ edges converging to a shared apex vertex and $L$ rungs connecting the rails at each level. It has $2L{+}1$ vertices, $3L$ massless internal propagators, $L$ loops, and three off-shell external legs at the two base vertices and the apex. The triangle ladder evaluates to the same $\Phi^{(L)}$ as the four-point box ladder and the generalised-ladder fan via the conformal magic identity, but is a genuinely different topology from both for $L \ge 2$: the triangle ladder has $V = 2L{+}1$, $E = 3L$ versus $V = L{+}2$, $E = 2L{+}1$ for the fan. Only $L = 1$ (the triangle) is shared. Value = PhiLadder[2, 1/3, 1/5].

Records.authors: Fevola, C., Mizera, S., Telen, S.
Records.description: Landau singularities of the planar triangle-bubble computed via principal Landau determinants.

Records.authors: Fevola, C., Mizera, S., Telen, S.
Records.description: Landau singularities of the planar triangle-bubble with zero internal, equal external masses, computed via principal Landau determinants.
